name: Shantanu Narayen
background: Mr. Narayen has served as Chair of the Board since January 2017, as Chief Executive Officer since December 2007 and as President since January 2005. He has been a director since September 2007. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from July 2005 to December 2007.

company_affiliations.name: Adobe Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chair of the Board, Chief Executive Officer, Director, President
